subcodes.first_line: O ye branches sprung from the Blessed Tree! The pen strokes of that abstracted Spirit tell of all things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الافنون المنشعب من الشجره المبارکه اثر کلک آن روح مجرد حکایت از کل شیء
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
